name: Rocky Road Carmel Corn Bars
recipeIngredient: 5 cups caramel corn (Can use Joel Murphy's recipe for this)
recipeInstructions:
Microwave the margarine in a microwave-safe bowl on high power for 45 seconds, or until melted. Add the miniature marshmallows and semisweet chocolate chips. Toss to coat with the melted margarine. Microwave for an additional 1 1/2 minutes, or until smooth when stirred. Stir after 45 seconds.
Combine the caramel corn and peanuts in a large bowl. Pour the melted mixture over the caramel corn and peanuts and toss to coat. Stir in the remaining marshmallows. Press into a greased 13 by 9 inch baking pan. Cool and cut into squares.
Conventional cooking directions:
Melt the margarine in a saucepan over low heat. Add the miniature marshmallows and semisweet chocolate chips, stirring until melted and well blended. Continue as directed above.
